nodes.name: Russet-capped tesia
nodes.summary: The russet-capped tesia (Tesia everetti) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Cettiidae. The scientific name commemorates British colonial administrator and zoological collector Alfred Hart Everett. Distribution and habitat It is found only in Indonesia. References

nodes.summary: Russet-capped tesia（Tesia everetti）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Russet-capped tesia。

nodes.name: Tesia
nodes.summary: Tesia（Tesia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如灰腹地莺、Javan tesia、Russet-capped tesia等4种鸟类。
